existing_features.title: Add status management UI to the admin panel with a form to select users and change their status
Display the current user's status on the Home Screen in a visible location

new_feature_requests.summary: Add user status/role system (Owner, Admin, User, Friend) manageable in admin panel and displayed on Home Screen
Add a user status/role type to the backend with four possible values: Owner, Admin, User, and Friend
Implement backend methods to change user status/role, including validation that only Admins and Owners can modify status
Create a backend query method to retrieve all users with their status information for display in the admin panel
